  1. Home
  2. Custom Magnets
  3. Custom Business Magnets

Custom Business Magnets

Magnetic Business Signs

 
  • Product Overview

Material

Magnetic Sign Material

Before purchasing magnets please make sure the intended surface is magnetic receptive. Magnets won't stick to aluminum or plastic vehicle body panels.

• 30 mil magentic material
• Lamination included
• Max print size is 24" x 24"
• Printed in full color

 

Magnet Cut Options

Magnetic Sign Cut Options

The standard finishing option is rounded corners. When you select rounded corners, it provides better airflow over your magnet and reduces the chances of it coming off. Contour or square cut options are also available. 

Artwork

Artwork Guidelines

Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps— with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System

If your magnet project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

Production Times

At Banners.com, we offer flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need to order.

Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option. 

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

Payment

All magnets must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog..

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

Shipping

General Shipping Guidelines

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after initial scheduled delivery.

International shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

Shipping Maps

Magnets

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods for magnetic signs:

Standard ( 3–5 Business Days )
Three Day ( 3 Business Days )
Two Day ( 2 Business Days )
Overnight ( 1 Business Day )
UPS Overnight AM

Economy Shipping

If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery.

Using economy shipping can also add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on where the package is being shipped to.

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 391-5300 and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

Product Options

    Upload a Print Ready File

    Please upload your 60 MB or smaller print ready file. Acceptable file formats include: .eps, .pdf, or high resolution .tiff or .jpg. Typically 300 dpi or higher resolution files work best.
    For files larger than 60 MB please call for instructions to insure the fastest service.

    Select File

    Let us design your product

    Please select any files that you would like to have included and provide our graphic designers with specific instructions on how you want your product to look. You will receive a proof via email once we have received your order.

    Browse

      Step 3 - Provide Instructions Please include any special instructions that our designers should know while putting your project together!

      Add to Cart

      More About Business Magnets

      Grow your reach with custom magnets that work across industries, no matter the size of your business. Whether you're a large PR firm or a small father-son plumbing crew, these magnets are designed to make your promotional efforts simple and effective. Made from high quality materials and printed using full CMYK colors, our magnets are built to last while standing out. Unlike decals, our custom business magnets can be applied and removed countless times, giving you maximum flexibility, performance, and long-term value. 

       

      Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top

      What material are your business magnets made from?

      Our magnets are printed on 30 mil magnetic material with a scratch-resistant, water-resistant laminate. We offer Standard 30 mil and Reflective 30 mil.

      Can I upload my own artwork for custom business magnets?

      Yes—use our online designer to upload your artwork or edit a pre-made template.

      What cut options are available for custom business magnets?

      We offer square cut, rounded-corner square cut, and die-cut (contour cut) options.

      Can my business magnet be cut to the shape of my logo or design?

      Yes—choose die-cut (contour cut) to have the magnet follow the outline of your design, with full-bleed printing (no unwanted border).

      What surfaces do business magnets stick to best?

      Magnets stick best to ferromagnetic metals like steel and won’t reliably stick to aluminum or many types of stainless steel, depending on the alloy. Quick test: if a refrigerator magnet sticks, your business magnet should too.

      What are business magnets commonly used for?

      Business magnets are commonly used as direct mail marketing so customers can keep your contact info on the fridge. They’re also used as appointment reminders, coupon magnets, and utility magnets (like “Clean/Dirty”) with your branding.

      Can I write on a business magnet?

      Yes—use a dry erase marker for erasable writing or a permanent marker (Sharpie) for longer-lasting text; remove permanent marker with warm soapy water or a mild cleaner.

      How long do custom business magnets last?

      With proper care and normal use, business magnets typically last 2–5 years.

       

      Why Choose Banners.com?

      Customer Service

      Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

      Fast Turnaround

      Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

       

      Quality Products

      Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

      Live Order Tracking

      Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
